description: RFC 3548 compliant Base16, Base32, and Base64 data encodings. Provides functions for encoding binary data to printable ASCII characters and decoding such encodings back to binary data.

functions.name: b64encode

params.name: altchars
params.description: A two-character string specifying alternative characters for '+' and '/' in the standard Base64 alphabet. Default is None (use standard alphabet).

functions.description: Encode a string using Base64. The encoded string is returned. Optional altchars must be a string of length 2 which specifies an alternative alphabet for the + and / characters.

functions.name: b64decode

params.name: s
params.description: The Base64 encoded string to decode

params.name: altchars
params.description: A two-character string specifying alternative characters for '+' and '/' in the standard Base64 alphabet. Default is None.

functions.description: Decode a Base64 encoded string. The decoded string is returned. A TypeError is raised if s has incorrect padding. Characters not in the Base64 alphabet are discarded.

functions.name: standard_b64encode

returns.description: The Base64 encoded string using the standard alphabet

functions.description: Encode a string using the standard Base64 alphabet (no altchars). Equivalent to b64encode(s).

functions.name: standard_b64decode

params.name: s
params.description: The Base64 encoded string to decode

functions.description: Decode a string encoded with the standard Base64 alphabet. Equivalent to b64decode(s).

functions.name: urlsafe_b64encode
functions.description: Encode a string using a URL-safe alphabet, which substitutes - instead of + and _ instead of / in the standard Base64 alphabet.

functions.name: urlsafe_b64decode

params.name: s
params.description: The URL-safe Base64 encoded string to decode

functions.description: Decode a string encoded with the URL-safe Base64 alphabet, which substitutes - instead of + and _ instead of / in the standard Base64 alphabet.

functions.name: b32encode
functions.description: Encode a string using Base32. The encoded string is returned.

functions.name: b32decode

params.name: s
params.description: The Base32 encoded string to decode

params.name: casefold
params.description: If True, accept both uppercase and lowercase Base32 alphabets. Default is False.

params.name: map01
params.description: If not None, specifies which letter 0 (zero) and 1 (one) should be mapped to. Default is None.

functions.description: Decode a Base32 encoded string. The decoded string is returned. A TypeError is raised if s has incorrect padding.

functions.name: b16encode

returns.description: The Base16 (hex) encoded string in uppercase

functions.description: Encode a string using Base16 (hexadecimal). The encoded string is returned in uppercase.

functions.name: b16decode

params.name: s
params.description: The Base16 encoded string to decode

params.name: casefold
params.description: If True, accept lowercase hex characters as well. Default is False.

functions.description: Decode a Base16 (hexadecimal) encoded string. The decoded string is returned. A TypeError is raised if s is incorrectly padded or contains non-hex characters.

functions.name: encodestring

returns.description: The Base64 encoded string with newlines inserted every 76 characters

functions.description: Encode a string using Base64, with newlines inserted after every 76 characters of output. Returns the encoded string. This is a legacy interface; prefer b64encode for new code.

functions.name: decodestring

params.name: s
params.description: The Base64 encoded string to decode

functions.description: Decode a Base64 encoded string. Returns the decoded string. This is a legacy interface; prefer b64decode for new code.
